query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `roaming_boss_catalog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `boss_code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(100),
  `tier` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `wuxing` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `base_hp` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5000,
  `base_attack` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 80,
  `base_defense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 40,
  `base_speed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 25,
  `base_magic_attack` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 60,
  `base_magic_defense` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  `skills` json,
  `drop_table` json,
  `exp_multiplier` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 2.0,
  `gold_multiplier` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 2.0,
  `move_interval_sec` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 300,
  `lifetime_minutes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `stamina_cost` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 15,
  `patrol_region` json,
  `spawn_node_id` varchar(50),
  `image_url` text,
  `description` text,
  `enrage_config` json,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `schedule_config` json,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  CONSTRAINT `roaming_boss_catalog_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `description` text,
